---
name: Evaluation feedback / 使用反馈
about: Share feedback about setup, integration, and documentation / 分享关于配置、集成和文档的反馈
title: "[feedback] "
labels: feedback
assignees: ""
---

## Context / 背景

What platform and setup did you use?  
你使用的是什么平台和环境？

## What worked well / 哪些地方顺利

Describe what was clear or useful.  
请描述哪些部分比较清晰或好用。

## What was confusing / 哪些地方不清楚

Describe where you got stuck or what felt unclear.  
请描述你卡住或感到困惑的地方。

## Documentation feedback / 文档反馈

Which docs helped, and which ones need work?  
哪些文档帮到了你？哪些还需要改进？

## Suggested next improvement / 你最希望优先改进什么

If you could ask for one improvement, what would it be?  
如果只能提一个改进建议，你最希望是什么？
